title: Viatora
description: Vanilla++. Adds bits and bobs to the vanilla features to make them a bit more fun
body:
### What is this mod about?
Viatora is a mod that aims to improve on some areas in fun or useful ways. It tries keeping the original game intact while making the gameplay a more enjoyable experience.

**Current features:**
- Snowballs and eggs will now deal knockback on players. (Config option)
- Beehives can be dyed and un-dyed with a waterbottle.
- Feather falling boots will not trample crops (Config option)

**THIS MOD IS IN EARLY DEVELOPMENT**
